title: clematis koreana var. lutea
intro: Clematis koreana var. lutea, also known as Korean clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to Korea and parts of Asia, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and delicate foliage. Traditionally, Clematis koreana var. lutea has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Clematis koreana var. lutea is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support mental well-being and promote a sense of calm.
